description: Discovery taxonomy — what the generator prompt asks for / extracts from upstream intents before rendering labels.

inputs.description: true if upstream arc-flash intent supplies per-node label data
Path to consumed arc-flash intent JSON (when intent present)
Engineering company name; appears on every label footer
Qualified-person name + role for signature placeholder
Optional project-scoped URL base; if present, labels carry <base>/<node_id> QR codes
{width, height} in mm; default {100, 75}; per-label override allowed
Optional per-node label-format override (skip auto-jurisdiction selection)
Optional per-node PPE clothing description override (custom text per facility convention)
Optional company-logo SVG path (skipped if absent)
Optional per-node label_recommended override (e.g., engineer requests label for normally-exempt node)
Optional client-specification overrides (label-size standard, PPE language convention)
